docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT; NOTICE OF SISTER STATE JUDGMENT ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF TEMPLE UNIVERSITY AS TO DEFENDANT ATTAHRI, YASSINE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
